meta.title: Elite Market — Luxury Perfumes, Watches, Sunglasses & Beauty
meta.description: Discover Better. Shop Smarter. Handpicked luxury perfumes, watches, sunglasses and beauty products from trusted retailers — Amazon & Noon.

hero.subtitle: Handpicked luxury perfumes, watches, sunglasses and beauty products from the world's most trusted retailers.

home.categoriesSubtitle: Every piece handpicked, reviewed, and linked to a retailer you already trust.
home.featuredSubtitle: The pieces our curators are obsessing over right now.
home.howSubtitle: We don't sell. We curate — then send you to the best price.
home.step1Body: Our editors handpick only pieces worth your attention across perfumes, watches, eyewear and beauty.
home.step2Body: Read honest reviews, pros and cons, and who each piece is best for — no fluff.
home.step3Body: One tap takes you to Amazon or Noon to buy at the best price. We never touch your payment.
home.valueCurationBody: Only the finest make the list.
home.valueHonestBody: Real pros, real cons, no hype.
